Petition By Co-Trustees Robert Klein And Debra Reynolds For Probate Code Section 850 Orders To Require Transfer Of Trust Assets
Off Calendar Oct-02-2007 Written Order Received
MINI MINUTES: James Feutz appearing for petitioners/co-trustees. Ernest Der appearing for conservator Debra Dolch.
Mr. Der expressed concern regarding the need of POA for the transfer of trust assets. The POA was suspended when the conservator was appionted. Mr Feutz wants to have the POA available, if not needed he will relinquish the power. He requested a status date to be set in 60 days and informed the court that the HSBC account should not have been listed. It has been transferred into the conservatorship. The status hearing is set on 12/03/07 to determine whether the POA is still needed or to be revoked. The court expressed concern as to some of the findings being including in the order. Mr Feutz will submit a revised order today. The revised order will not include all the findings on the safe guarding his assets.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Bailiff: Rob Harris Clerk: Rosie Noguera

Petition By Co-Trustees Robert Klein And Debra Reynolds For Probate Code Section 850 Orders To Require Transfer Of Trust Assets
